title: AI analysis of data from multiple sensors can improve earthquake detection
description: One seismometer is often not enough to reliably detect earthquakes or human activity such as underground nuclear tests. Rather, researchers combine readings from seismometers distributed across a small geographic area to gain confidence in their analysis. Artificial intelligence (AI) can combine readings from multiple sensors more effectively than classic technology, enabling more reliable detection of weak seismic signals, a new study by A. Köhler and colleagues shows.
content: One seismometer is often not enough to reliably detect earthquakes or human activity such as underground nuclear tests. Rather, researchers combine readings from seismometers distributed across a small geographic area to gain confidence in their anal... [2103 chars]

title: Drones, AI, large-scale hiring part of 25-year road map for Delhi: Chief Fire Officer
description: The Delhi Fire Services (DFS) plans to add eight new fire stations every year, carry out large-scale recruitment, and deploy drones and artificial intelligence (AI) to strengthen the Capital’s firefighting infrastructure as part of its 25-year road map, Chief Fire Officer Abhilash K. Malik said.

title: Firmus wants to build three AI data centres in Tasmania, but can the state handle them?
description: An artificial intelligence company wants to build three AI factories in Tasmania, but questions are being raised about the impacts and benefits for the state.
content:

title: The next UPI moment for India could be artificial intelligence
description: India's digital public infrastructure transformed services like payments and identity. The next step, the article argues, is to build similar shared infrastructure for artificial intelligence. Trusted data, interoperable platforms, governance, and AI-ready talent could help India move beyond AI pilots and unlock more than $500 billion in economic value by 2030.

title: Most U.S. shares climb toward finish of strong week
description: Most U.S. stocks are rising Thursday after the latest update on the job market suggested the U.S. Federal Reserve may feel less pressure to hike interest rates. But more swings for chip stocks and other winners of the artificial-intelligence boom are keeping indexes mixed.

title: Unchecked AI use in courts could be 'catastrophic': SC
description: The Supreme Court has issued a stern warning regarding the unchecked use of artificial intelligence in legal proceedings, deeming it potentially "catastrophic." Justices emphasized the grave threat posed by fabricated AI-generated legal precedents to the justice system's integrity. Consequently, the Bar Council of India is tasked with forming a committee to establish guidelines and disciplinary measures for AI in legal practice.
content:

title: Military hardware, energy supply chains to fortify India-Japan ties
description: India and Japan have officially strengthened their strategic partnership, emphasizing initiatives aimed at economic security and collaborative military technology development. Important agreements focus on advancements in artificial intelligence and enhancing energy supply chains, particularly in semiconductors and critical minerals. Prime Minister Modi highlighted technology as fundamental, introducing a joint naval radio antenna project and designating 2027 as the India-Japan Year of Shared Horizons.
